description: Microsoft SQL Server — database enumeration, command execution via xp_cmdshell, credential extraction, and Net-NTLM hash capture.

tools.name: mssqlclient.py (Impacket)
tools.description: Interactive MSSQL client supporting Windows authentication, SQL authentication, pass-the-hash, and Kerberos.

commands.title: Windows auth with password
commands.description: Connect using Windows/domain authentication.

commands.title: Windows auth with PtH
commands.description: Connect using pass-the-hash with Windows auth.

commands.title: Windows auth with Kerberos
commands.description: Connect using Kerberos authentication.

commands.title: SQL auth with password
commands.description: Connect using SQL Server authentication (sa, dbadmin, etc.).

commands.title: SQL auth as sa
commands.description: Connect as the SQL Server sa account.

commands.title: Enable xp_cmdshell
commands.description: Enable xp_cmdshell for OS command execution (run inside mssqlclient session).

commands.title: Execute OS command via xp_cmdshell
commands.description: Execute an OS command via xp_cmdshell (run inside mssqlclient session).

commands.title: Capture Net-NTLM hash via xp_dirtree
commands.description: Force the SQL server to authenticate to your SMB listener and capture its Net-NTLM hash.

commands.title: Read a file via xp_cmdshell
commands.description: Read a file on the target via OS command.

commands.title: Enumerate databases
commands.description: List all databases on the SQL server.

commands.title: Enumerate linked servers
commands.command: SQL> SELECT srvname, isremote FROM sysservers;
commands.description: List linked SQL servers (potential lateral movement path).

commands.title: Execute on linked server
commands.description: Execute a command on a linked SQL server.

commands.title: Impersonate another user
commands.command: SQL> EXECUTE AS LOGIN = 'sa'; SELECT SYSTEM_USER;
commands.description: Impersonate the sa login if impersonation privileges exist.

tools.name: NetExec (nxc) — MSSQL
tools.description: MSSQL enumeration, credential validation, and command execution via NetExec.

commands.title: Authenticate with password
commands.description: Test SQL credentials against the target.

commands.title: Authenticate with Windows auth
commands.description: Test Windows/domain credentials.

commands.title: Authenticate with PtH
commands.description: Authenticate using an NTLM hash.

commands.title: Execute SQL query
commands.description: Execute a SQL query on the target.

commands.title: Execute OS command (-x)
commands.description: Execute an OS command via xp_cmdshell.

commands.title: Execute PowerShell (-X)
commands.description: Execute a PowerShell command via xp_cmdshell.

commands.title: Enumerate databases
commands.description: List all databases.

commands.title: Check for sysadmin role
commands.description: Check if the current user has sysadmin privileges.

commands.title: Password spray
commands.description: Spray a single password against multiple SQL accounts.

commands.title: Capture Net-NTLM hash
commands.description: Force MSSQL to authenticate to your SMB listener.

tools.name: sqsh
tools.description: Command-line SQL client for interactive MSSQL sessions.

commands.title: Connect with SQL auth
commands.description: Connect using SQL Server authentication.

commands.title: Connect with Windows auth
commands.description: Connect using Windows/domain authentication.

commands.title: Execute inline query
commands.description: Execute a query non-interactively and display results.
